nodes.label: Approved Baseline 0.1.1
nodes.rationale: Version 0.1.1 is preserved as the immutable behavioral and visual baseline while the repository is made reproducible.

nodes.label: Source Migration First
nodes.rationale: Migration must be isolated from features, refactors, dependency upgrades, and version bumps so provenance and behavior remain auditable.

nodes.label: Research Before Implementation
nodes.rationale: New mechanisms should follow auditable research and adopt, adapt, or reject classification, favoring proven approaches.

nodes.label: Compatibility Layer for Obsidian Internals
nodes.rationale: Undocumented Obsidian internals must be isolated with a fallback and recorded risk so they can fail without destabilizing the plugin.

nodes.label: Mobile-First Runtime
nodes.rationale: The plugin must remain usable on mobile, keep isDesktopOnly false, and exclude Node.js and Electron from its runtime bundle.

nodes.label: Note Content Integrity
nodes.rationale: Visual preferences and scaling must never modify Markdown, frontmatter, or note content.

nodes.label: Lightweight Lifecycle and Complete Cleanup
nodes.rationale: onload stays light and onunload removes all UI and side effects so disabling or reloading leaves no residue.

nodes.label: Behavior and Appearance Separation
nodes.rationale: TypeScript owns behavior while CSS owns appearance to preserve clear responsibilities and failure isolation.

nodes.label: Physical iPad Validation
nodes.rationale: Changes affecting appearance, touch, orientation, safe areas, focus, VoiceOver, or placement require validation on physical iPad hardware.

nodes.label: Local Privacy and Scope
nodes.rationale: The plugin runs locally, collects no analytics, sends no note contents over the network, and stores no visual preferences in notes.

nodes.label: Approved Artifact Hashes
nodes.rationale: SHA-256 hashes provide a reproducible comparison point across the approved build, installed plugin, and release download.

nodes.label: Maintainer-Authorized TypeScript Source
nodes.source_location: Mandatory first task: migrate the source
nodes.rationale: The archival TypeScript snapshot that produced 0.1.1 must be used; reverse-engineered main.js is explicitly not accepted as source.

nodes.label: Isolated Source Migration
nodes.source_location: Mandatory first task: migrate the source
nodes.rationale: Source, tests, tooling, and build configuration must be migrated without changing behavior, CSS, dependencies, versions, or release assets.

nodes.label: Native Rotated HTML Range
nodes.rationale: A native HTML range is rotated to provide reliable vertical slider behavior.

nodes.label: Milestone 1 Presentation Mode
nodes.rationale: Presentation mode must capture prior state, restore deterministically, provide recovery, and never trap the interface.

nodes.label: Milestone 3 Optional Reading Aids
nodes.rationale: Reading aids remain independently prototyped and disabled until approved; each must fail independently, avoid note writes, and not rely only on color.

nodes.label: Continuous Evidence-Based Refinement
nodes.rationale: Changes should follow observed friction and preserve presentation reliability over convenience.

links.source_location: Mandatory first task: migrate the source
